title: dianthus caryophyllus var. longicaulis
intro: Dianthus caryophyllus var. longicaulis, also known as the sweet william long, is a perennial flowering plant in the carnation family. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, making it effective in treating wounds, sore throats, and digestive issues. The health benefits of Dianthus caryophyllus var. longicaulis include its ability to boost the immune system, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems. The plant can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion, and is also used in herbal remedies such as salves and ointments to promote healing and soothe skin irritations.
